---
title: An empirical approach for the prediction of annual mean nitrogen dioxide concentrations in London
date: '2001-01-01'
author:
- D.C. Carslaw
- S.D. Beevers
- G. Fuller
categories:
- Journal Article
publication: '*Atmospheric Environment*'
---

## An empirical approach for the prediction of annual mean nitrogen dioxide concentrations in London

<p class="pub-meta">D.C. Carslaw, S.D. Beevers, G. Fuller</p>

_*Atmospheric Environment*_, 2001


<div class="pub-links">
<a href="carslaw-2001.bib" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm"><i class="bi bi-download"></i> BibTeX</a>
</div>
